message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ActorBorderColor black
  ActorFontSize 28
  ParticipantFontSize 28
  LifeLineBorderColor black
  LifeLineBackgroundColor white
  ParticipantBorderColor black
  ParticipantBackgroundColor white
  ActivationBorderColor black
  ActivationBackgroundColor #bfe0ff
}

actor Client as C
participant Game as G
participant Player as P <<(S,#dcdcf0)>>

C -> G : getScoreInformation()
activate G

G -> P : __toString()
activate P
P --> G : return $name
deactivate P

G --> C : Score Information
deactivate G
@enduml
